name: fetch_crypto_price
description: Look up current cryptocurrency price data by symbol, name, slug, or CoinLore coin ID using public market data.

query.description: Cryptocurrency symbol, name, URL slug, or CoinLore numeric coin ID to look up, for example BTC, bitcoin, Ethereum, or 90.

include_matches.description: When true, include alternate asset matches considered during lookup; useful for ambiguous symbols like PAY or META.
